titleStmt.title: SII 35.16: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 16. (A.R. No. 84 of 1951-52.) HIRĒKERŪR, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. II) set up near Tōṭada Vīraṇṇa temple outside the village.

This inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 976, Jaya, Pausha-Amāvāsye, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1054 December 31. However, the week day was Saturday.

It registers a gift of 3 mattal (i.e. mattar) and 13 kammas of guṇiga wet land in the open space of Hosageṟe and another gift of 400 gadyāṇas for the feeding of the visitors to the village by Śrīdharakravinta of Chakradhara Bīsavayya of Viśvāmitragōtra, Īśvarayya of Padmanābha-shaḷaṅgi and Nāraṇa-ghaisāsa, Īśvara-kravinta of Surapati Nāraṇakravinta and Vasudēvayya of Kariya (black) Sōvaṇṇa-kravinta collectively. These donors who were the sons-in-law (?) of Musukiṭṭa(ṇṇa) mayya, son Dēvimayya of Āṅgirasagōtra made the above gifts that merit might accrue to their father-in-law. It appears that the land given as gift was purchased from the Thousand (Mahājanas) of the Mahāgrāma (village) Piriyakeṟeyūr. These Thousand were conversant with yama, niyama, svādhyāya, dhyāna etc., which were usual to them.
The record was written by Sōmanātha, son of Gasīyya who was a devotee of all the gods, brahmins and preceptors. Published in K.I. Vol. IV, No. 25.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta dēvadvijaguru pādārādhakaṁ gasīyyana ta
tsūnu sōmanāthana likhita . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladē
vara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire [.] svasti yamaniya
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāna japasamā
dhi guṇaśīlasaṁpannarappa śrīmanmahāgrāmaṁ piriya ke
ṟeyūra sakala sāsirvvargge svasti sakavariṣa 976 neya
jayasaṁvatsarada pauṣadamavāse Ādityavāra Uttarāya
ṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu Āṁgirasagōtrada dēvimayyana putra
musukiṭṭaṇṇamayyaṁge parōkṣavinayadiṁ śrēyassu
vāgi Avaraḷiyaṁdiru viśvāmitragōtrada cakrādhara
bisavayyanavara śrīdhara kravitaruṁ padmanābha ṣaḷaṁ
giyara Iśvarayyanu Avara nāraṇaghaḷisāsaru su
rapati nāraṇa kraviṁtara Iśvara kraviṁtaru kariya sōvaṇna
kraviṁtara vāsudēvayyanumiṁtinibarumirddu kosa
geṟeya bayalalluṇiganalmūṟu mattaluṁ hadimū
ṟu kammagaddeyaṁ baṁda pravāsigaruṇbaṁtāgi Ā caṁdrā
rkkasthāyi māḍi harivaḍige biṭṭu grāmakke pādapūje gū
ṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ nālnūṟu Iṁtīdharmavanārorvvarprati
pālisidavaggē vāraṇāsi prayāge Arghyutīrtha kurukṣētra
viṁtī puṇyatīrthastānaṁgaḷoḷsāsira brāhmaṇargge sāsi
ra kavileyaṁ koṭṭa puṇyamakku Iṁtidanaḷidavaru
Ā tīrthastānadalu sāyira brāhmaṇaruvaṁ sāyira kavi
leyumanaḷide mahāpātakanakku © © © ©
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā hasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jā tuṁnri
pāṇāṁ kālē bhāgi
naḥ ḻpārtthi bhadra .
madva mana
sā bhuvi yati dharmma
midaṁ sa Eracitāṁjalirēṣa mūrdhni
ṇigeya suddhavudakaṁ cakradhara bisavayya padmanā
giyaraṁ nāraṇakravita Iśvarakravitaruṁ vāgi
ṁ koṭṭa
Digital edition of SII 35.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
